message:
test(sdk): add enum label, serde roundtrip, and failure-path tests for SDK contracts

Add 10 tests for robot_sdk_contracts types:

- HttpMethod: label() for all 4 variants, serde roundtrip
- SdkLanguage: extension() and label() for all 4 variants, serde roundtrip
- CompatLevel: serde roundtrip for all 5 variants
- MappingDirection: serde roundtrip
- ReplayTestResult: serde roundtrip
- ReplayTestSuiteResult: mixed pass/fail reports correct pass_rate
  and filters failed test IDs
- ErrorCodeSpec: serde roundtrip

Total robot_sdk_contracts tests: 33 (was 23).

Build: --no-default-features
All 33 pass (0.01s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
